standard.summary: Ecosystem and distribution standard for complete AINP project packages.
standard.runtime_boundary: Non-executable standard data. This file is not an AISOP flow, not an AIAP program and not a runtime trust proof.

package_profile.name: complete_ainp_project
required_loop: plan guides content through content_architecture and acceptance_criteria
report binds artifacts back to the plan and content files
feedback binds content review back to the same generation id

distribution_requirements.summary: Plan and content are structurally co-equal.
Report evidence covers planned content files.
Feedback closes the plan-content revision loop.
Release is structural and evidence-chain validation only.
distribution_requirements.boundary: No registry approval, package trust, legal compliance or content truth is implied.

distribution_requirements.summary: Optional reference materials are indexed without becoming content or trust roots.
distribution_requirements.boundary: Protocol snapshots, templates, briefs and research files under ainp/references/ are integrity snapshots only. external_uri entries are not fetched and cannot carry local sha256 anchors.

requires: project package paths and feedback loop are aligned

explicit_non_goals: No AIAP runtime or agent-manifest structure.
No trust registry or signature proof in this standard file.
